name: Ubiquiti UniFi U7 Mesh
title: Ubiquiti UniFi U7 Mesh
description: The Ubiquiti U7 Mesh is a compact yet powerful access point designed to deliver next-generation wireless performance using the WiFi 7 (802.11be) standard. With a modern cylindrical design and dimensions of ⌀48.5 × 159.5 mm, it is suitable for both indoor and outdoor deployments while maintaining a minimal visual footprint. This model supports 4 spatial streams and operates with 2×2 DL/UL MU-MIMO on both the 5 GHz and 2.4 GHz bands, enabling efficient simultaneous communication with multiple devices. It achieves maximum data rates of up to 4.3 Gbps on the 5 GHz band (BW240) and up to 688 Mbps on the 2.4 GHz band (BW40), ensuring stable performance for high-bandwidth applications. The device also supports multiple WiFi standards, including 802.11be (WiFi 7), 802.11ax (WiFi 6) up to 2.4 Gbps, 802.11ac (WiFi 5) up to 1.7 Gbps, and 802.11n up to 300 Mbps, providing backward compatibility.

detailed_description.heading: WiFi 7 Performance
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti U7 Mesh is a compact yet powerful access point designed to deliver next-generation wireless performance using the WiFi 7 (802.11be) standard. With a modern cylindrical design and dimensions of ⌀48.5 × 159.5 mm, it is suitable for both indoor and outdoor deployments while maintaining a minimal visual footprint. This model supports 4 spatial streams and operates with 2×2 DL/UL MU-MIMO on both the 5 GHz and 2.4 GHz bands, enabling efficient simultaneous communication with multiple devices. It achieves maximum data rates of up to 4.3 Gbps on the 5 GHz band (BW240) and up to 688 Mbps on the 2.4 GHz band (BW40), ensuring stable performance for high-bandwidth applications. The device also supports multiple WiFi standards, including 802.11be (WiFi 7), 802.11ax (WiFi 6) up to 2.4 Gbps, 802.11ac (WiFi 5) up to 1.7 Gbps, and 802.11n up to 300 Mbps, providing backward compatibility.

detailed_description.heading: WiFi 7 Performance
detailed_description.text: The integrated antenna system is optimized for both coverage and signal strength. On the 5 GHz band, it features omnidirectional gain of 6 dBi and directional gain of up to 10 dBi, while the 2.4 GHz band operates with 3 dBi gain. Maximum transmit power reaches 24 dBm for 5 GHz and 23 dBm for 2.4 GHz, allowing consistent signal delivery across the coverage area. With an effective coverage of up to 140 m² and the ability to support more than 200 connected clients, the U7 Mesh is engineered for dense wireless environments requiring stable and high-speed connectivity.

detailed_description.heading: Advanced Network Features
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti U7 Mesh integrates a comprehensive set of advanced networking features designed to optimize wireless performance and provide precise control over network behavior. Wireless meshing capability allows flexible network expansion without additional Ethernet cabling, making it suitable for scalable deployments. The device supports key roaming and optimization standards, including 802.11r Fast Roaming, 802.11k Radio Resource Management (RRM), and 802.11v BSS Transition Management. These technologies ensure seamless connectivity and efficient handoff between access points. Band steering dynamically assigns clients to the optimal frequency band to improve overall throughput and reduce congestion.

detailed_description.heading: Advanced Network Features
detailed_description.text: For network segmentation and control, each radio supports up to 8 BSSIDs, enabling multiple SSIDs within a single deployment. Additional features include WiFi speed limiting, client device isolation, and configurable WiFi schedules, allowing administrators to tailor network access policies. Security and authentication capabilities include Private Pre-Shared Key (PPSK), RADIUS over TLS (RadSec), and dynamic VLAN assignment via RADIUS. Support for Passpoint (Hotspot 2.0) enhances user experience in managed environments. Device management is performed over Ethernet using the UniFi Network application (version 10.1.85 and later). Mobile management is available through UniFi applications for iOS (version 10.32.1 and later) and Android (version 10.35.1 and later), providing centralized configuration and monitoring.

detailed_description.heading: Durable Design
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti U7 Mesh is engineered for durability and flexible installation across a wide range of environments. The enclosure is constructed from UV-stabilized polycarbonate, ensuring resistance to environmental exposure and long-term reliability. When installed using the included outdoor mount, the device meets IPX6 weatherproofing standards, providing protection against heavy rain. With a weight of 313 g, the access point remains lightweight and easy to handle during installation. It supports multiple mounting options, including wall mounting, pole mounting, and table placement using the included stand and mounting accessories, allowing adaptable deployment scenarios.

detailed_description.heading: Durable Design
detailed_description.text: Power is supplied via Power over Ethernet (PoE), simplifying infrastructure requirements by combining power and data transmission through a single cable. The device operates within a supported voltage range of 42.5–57V DC and includes a PoE adapter in the package. Maximum power consumption is limited to 13W, ensuring energy-efficient operation. Networking is provided through a single 2.5 GbE RJ45 uplink port, delivering high-speed wired connectivity to support modern network demands. The device is NDAA compliant and certified according to CE, FCC, and IC standards, ensuring suitability for regulated and professional environments.
